DisclaimerText.SourceString: Note: This purchase is not eligible for refund. Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: Note: This purchase is not eligible for refund. Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.

ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" Case="AllCaps">Complete quests to </>earn up to 28 levels<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" Case="AllCaps"> and </> cosmetic rewards <text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" Case="AllCaps"> before the end of Season 1.</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" Case="AllCaps">Explore the Chapter 3 island in each quest to find a hidden</> Level Up Token.

<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" Case="AllCaps">For every quest completed, you'll earn 1 full level up!</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" Case="AllCaps">7 additional quests become available each week</> until the end of Season 1 (March 19 2022 ET). <text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" Case="AllCaps">Complete sets of quests in order to unlock new cosmetic rewards.</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" Case="AllCaps">What's included?</>
